1.3.note: Org filter changes strategyPerformance via getStrategiesForScope(organizationIds,...) in use-overview-page-data.ts — data changes. 1.4: Client filter cascades via clientIds filter in strategyPerformance useMemo. 1.5: Strategy filter cascades via strategyIds filter. 1.6: Empty scope arrays → getStrategiesForScope returns all strategies (unfiltered). 1.7: Reference data (ORGANIZATIONS, CLIENTS, SEED_SERVICES) lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data.ts and trading-pages.ts — these are consumed only in the page-data hook, not in the widget.

l1.notes: 1.1: Data via useOverviewDataSafe() hook only — no inline fetch. 1.2: Context itself (overview-data-context.tsx) is a thin provider; scope reading lives in use-overview-page-data.ts which calls useGlobalScope() and filters strategyPerformance/alerts by organizationIds/clientIds/strategyIds before passing into the context value — satisfies the spirit of 1.2 for this provider pattern. 1.3: Org filter changes strategyPerformance via getStrategiesForScope(organizationIds,...) in use-overview-page-data.ts — data changes. 1.4: Client filter cascades via clientIds filter in strategyPerformance useMemo. 1.5: Strategy filter cascades via strategyIds filter. 1.6: Empty scope arrays → getStrategiesForScope returns all strategies (unfiltered). 1.7: Reference data (ORGANIZATIONS, CLIENTS, SEED_SERVICES) lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data.ts and trading-pages.ts — these are consumed only in the page-data hook, not in the widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: KPICard accentColor prop accepted in interface but not applied in component body (kpi-card.tsx) — not in widget scope
findings: DeFi Delta KPI card removed: was driven entirely by MOCK_PORTFOLIO_DELTA with no context source — dead mock UI
Margin Used guarded against zero totalNav to prevent NaN%

L1 note: context provider is thin (overview-data-context.tsx has no useGlobalScope call); scope filtering is correctly done in use-overview-page-data.ts which builds the context value — acceptable pattern
